text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
We usually only use the word "sakura," but there
are many kinds of sakura trees.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Someiyoshino, shidarezakura, yamazakura,
kanhizakura... That's just to name a few.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Baku never stops moving forward, so she's a
kanhizakura. Chiyo has strong roots like a
yamazakura. They're both "sakura" but the
flowers they bloom are unique.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wonder what kind of sakura I'll turn out to
be. What do you think, Trainer?
